title: Changes in 222
wikitext:
[]: Changes in 2.22?             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Jan 12, 2011 1:26 am Can anyone tell me what was changed for 2.22? I know there was a list for 1.10, but I haven't found one for the second movie yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Jan 12, 2011 2:12 am Nothing much was changed. Just a few scenes were added in. Nothing major.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 12, 2011 2:17 am Eva 04 wrote: Just a few scenes were added in.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Jan 12, 2011 2:20 am Mr. Tines wrote: The question asked was whether there is a list of these changes -- even if they are insignificant apart from some fanservice value (like swimsuit Ritsuko re-appearing in 1.11 after being absent in 1.0).

[]: Re: Changes in 2.22?             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 12, 2011 3:22 am chaosakita wrote: Can anyone tell me what was changed for 2.22? I know there was a list for 1.10, but I haven't found one for the second movie yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jan 12, 2011 5:18 pm http://www.evageeks.org/2010/04/evangelion-2-22-screening/ was this just a misunderstanding, or is there really an english version of Tsubasa kudasai?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 12, 2011 5:26 pm Clicking the "Discuss in forums" link for that news post would have answered your question, but here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=357871#357871
